steps.title: Subtract the constant
steps.content:
Start with $5p+180=250$. Subtract $180$ from both sides:
$$5p=70$$

steps.title: Check quickly
steps.content:
Substitute $p=14$ back into the original equation:
$$5(14)+180=70+180=250$$
So it satisfies the equation exactly. This also rules out larger choices, which would make the left side greater than $250$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $p=14$, which matches choice A. Therefore A is correct.
